zh.lifeSummary: 當George Hutchinson Jr.於1593年11月出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，他的父親George Hutchinson43歲，母親Jane Lowther24歲。他於大約1632年與Margaret在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1630年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托。他去世於1660年12月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Hutchinson Jr.于1593年11月出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，他的父亲George Hutchinson43岁，母亲Jane Lowther24岁。他于大约1632年与Margaret在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1630年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托。他去世于1660年12月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When George Hutchinson Jr. was born in November 1593, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, his father, George Hutchinson, was 43 and his mother, Jane Lowther, was 24. He married Margaret about 1632, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He immigrated to Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1630. He died on 11 December 1660, in Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67.

Il a immigré au Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1630. ja.lifeSummary: George Hutchinson Jr.が1593年11月にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父George Hutchinsonは43歳，母Jane Lowtherは24歳であった。約1632年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーワテルトウンに移住した。彼は1660年12月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスチャーレストウンで67歳で死去した。

ko.Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운
ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.Charlestown, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Uni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 찰레스타운
ko.lifeSummary: George Hutchinson Jr.(이)가 1593년 11월 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Hutchinson(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Lowther(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1632년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1630년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1660년 12월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Hutchinson Jr. nasceu em novembro de 1593, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Hutchinson, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Jane Lowther, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret aproximadamente 1632, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele imigrou para o Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1630. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1660, em Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Hutchinson Jr. родился ноябрь 1593 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени George Hutchinson было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Lowther, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret около 1632 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он иммигрировал в вэитиртоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1630 году. Он умер 11 декабря 1660 г. в местности чарльстоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Hutchinson Jr. nació en noviembre de 1593, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, George Hutchinson, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Jane Lowther, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret aproximadamente 1632, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Inmigró a Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1630. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1660, en Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años.
